name: DIRT: The Last Great American Sport
original_name: DIRT: The Last Great American Sport
overview: A docuseries that gives a look into the world of dirt track racing like you've never seen before by telling the story of NASCAR superstar Kyle Larson as he travels to dirt tracks across the country battling his fiercest rivals.

trailers.title: FOX Sports Films’ DIRT: THE LAST GREAT AMERICAN SPORT Premieres May 16 at 7PM ET on FS1 | Trailer
